nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜
nodes.summary: 尼加拉瓜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括山冠雉、Yucatan bobwhite、Spot-bellied bobwhite等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 委內瑞拉

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 圭亚那
nodes.summary: 圭亚那是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联285种鸟类，包括灰䳍、灰腿穴䳍、红脚穴䳍等285种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴西

nodes.name: 洪都拉斯
nodes.summary: 洪都拉斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联132种鸟类，包括山冠雉、White-bellied chachalaca、茶臉鶉等132种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Scaled antpitta
nodes.summary: Scaled antpitta（Scaled antpitta，学名 Grallaria guatimalensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联17个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 哥斯达黎加

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: roraimae: tepui area where southern Venezuela, central western Guyana, and northern Brazil meet; population on Margarita Island might be this subspecies A single scaled antpitta was captured in a mist net in Belize in 2024. The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society lists the scaled antpitta as vagrant on Trinidad. The scaled antpitta inhabits a variety of landscapes in the upper tropical and lower temperate zones

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: roraimae: tepui area where southern Venezuela, central western Guyana, and northern Brazil meet; population on Margarita Island might be this subspecies A single scaled antpitta was captured in a mist net in Belize in 2024. The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society lists the scaled antpitta as vagrant on Trinidad. The scaled antpitta inhabits a variety of landscapes in the upper tropical and lower temperate zones

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is almost always on the forest floor and usually favors areas with dense vegetation. In northern Central America it is found in humid semi-deciduous forest, pine-oak forest, and cloudforest. In Costa Rica it is found in wet montane forest. In elevation it generally occurs between in Mexico and Central America but only in Costa Rica. It is found below in Colombia, between in Venezuela, mostly below but as high as in Ecuador, and between in Peru

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is almost always on the forest floor and usually favors areas with dense vegetation. In northern Central America it is found in humid semi-deciduous forest, pine-oak forest, and cloudforest. In Costa Rica it is found in wet montane forest. In elevation it generally occurs between in Mexico and Central America but only in Costa Rica. It is found below in Colombia, between in Venezuela, mostly below but as high as in Ecuador, and between in Peru
